name: Minestrone Soup#2 (Diabetic)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups red kidney beans, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush a 5-quart heavy Dutch oven with olive oil.
2. Add meat and stir to break apart. Cook until browned, drain off fat, and rinse under hot water. Return to the Dutch oven.
3. Add onions, celery, green pepper, zucchini, cabbage, potatoes, carrots, canned tomatoes, water, beef broth, salt (to taste), Worcestershire sauce, pepper, basil, and bay leaves. Stir well.
4. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer covered for 1-1-1/4 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Add kidney beans and macaroni, then cook another 30 minutes.
6. Ladle into warmed soup bowls and sprinkle each bowl with 1 teaspoon grated Parmesan cheese.
